name: DiagTrackEoP Default Login Username
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: DiagTrackEoP Default Login Username
SIGMA Description: Detects the default "UserName" used by the DiagTrackEoP POC

False positives:
- Unlikely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=9 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%thisisnotvaliduser%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY DiagTrackEoP Default Login Username on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4624 AND "Logon Type"=9 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%thisisnotvaliduser%' AQL filter query
